title: FactExtraction
description: Structured extraction of factual claims from source material

source.description: Identifier or URL of the source material

claim.description: A single factual claim extracted from the source

confidence.description: Confidence that this fact is accurately extracted

entities.description: Named entities referenced in this fact

supporting_quote.description: Verbatim quote from source that supports the claim

summary.description: Brief summary of the key facts extracted
